name: book-of-git
description: Git workflow skills for repository hygiene and workspace cleanup.

interface.longDescription: Book of Git packages guarded Git workflow skills for repository hygiene, local worktree cleanup, branch cleanup, and main branch refresh tasks.
defaultPrompt: Use $git-workspace-cleanup to prune local worktrees and branches back to main.
Use $git-workspace-cleanup to keep only the main worktree and update main.
